top_signals.title: China’s Xi warns of ‘law of the jungle’ at Putin summit
top_signals.summary: Russian and Chinese leaders promote energy and technology co-operation days after Donald Trump’s Beijing visit
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Defense Sector Shifts Focus to Ops Systems with Meghan Welch
top_signals.summary: Meghan Welch, Managing Director at Brown Gibbons Lang & Co., discussed the evolving landscape of defense sector investing on Bloomberg Surveillance. She emphasized that the next phase of defense investment is increasingly centered on the systems that maintain military readiness and operational capability daily, rather than solely on weaponry. Welch highlighted that this shift is attracting significant interest and funding from both public and private markets, driven by critical tailwinds supporting the defense industry. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: UK Trade Tariff: duty suspensions and autonomous tariff quotas
top_signals.summary: Temporary duty suspensions and autonomous tariff quotas (ATQs) for importing goods into the UK.

top_signals.title: Lean Into Cyclicals With Broad-Based Recovery Ahead, HSBC's Kettner Advises
top_signals.summary: Max Kettner, HSBC chief multi asset strategist, discusses how he is investing during what he sees as a "incredibly K-shaped" US economy. He speaks on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: US Long Bond Yield Hits Highest Since 2007 on Inflation Concern - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: US Long Bond Yield Hits Highest Since 2007 on Inflation Concern  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
